privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for sugar_env literacy_lesson_plan task. Verified that the task requires generative synthesis of a new document without pre-existing data. Confirmed the expected output file path (/home/ga/Documents/literacy_plan.odt), required headings (Learning Objectives, Daily Schedule, Assessment), requirement for an XML table, and Sugar Journal title ('Literacy Plan Week 3') exactly match the task description instructions and verifier logic.
